claims.summary: Mirror, Dialogue, and Witness are distinct relational modes rather than a single health-monitor loop.
claims.disposition: verify mode-role ownership, mixed-frame support, and read-only Witness rendering

claims.summary: High entropy can coexist with settled habitability without being normalized into contradiction.
claims.disposition: verify Witness semantic-density mapping, inhabitable fluctuation, and non-categorical texture evidence

claims.summary: A stalled correspondence awaiting peer acknowledgement does not prove lack of presence.
claims.disposition: verify non-instrumental presence, explicit stall reason, thread trace, and no-absence inference

claims.summary: Issuing a new SHADOW_PREFLIGHT metaphor or TRACE request would send or solicit peer semantic content.
claims.disposition: retain both proposed correspondence probes as Tier 5 peer-content work requiring explicit Mike/operator approval and right-to-ignore handling

claims.summary: Witness needs grounded semantic-density context without hard-coding felt adjectives from metric bands.
claims.disposition: verify WitnessSemanticDensityMappingV1, provenance parents, and interpretation-not-producer authority
